name: Bank of Zambia Licensing Portal
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
compliance_notes: Public licensing-process page only; no account access or application submission.

name: Bank of Zambia Financial Sector Development
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
compliance_notes: Public policy context page; use for regulator-role and market-structure watch.

name: Bank of Zambia Payment Systems Regulatory Framework
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
compliance_notes: Historical public HTML endpoint retained for reference. It currently returns only a loader/404 in the local public-source crawler, so BoZ payment-rails monitoring now uses official PDF sources below.

name: Bank of Zambia Regulatory Documents API
exclude_keywords: calendar for submission of monthly money receipt and remittance returns
calendar for submission of payment systems returns
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ JSON:API used by the BoZ website. Collects only public regulatory document metadata and source file links for payment-rails monitoring.

name: Bank of Zambia National Payment System Vision and Strategy 2023-2027
compliance_notes: Legacy public PDF URL found in search results. The current BoZ site returns the SPA shell for this root PDF path, so keep disabled until the current file URL is confirmed through BoZ public APIs.

name: Bank of Zambia National Payment Systems Annual Report 2023
compliance_notes: Legacy public PDF URL found in search results. The current BoZ site returns the SPA shell for this root PDF path, so keep disabled until the current publications API/file URL is confirmed.

name: Bank of Zambia Electronic Money Issuance Directives 2023
compliance_notes: Official public directive PDF discovered through the BoZ regulatory documents JSON:API. Use to map public e-money operating obligations relevant to lending ops and payment rails.

name: Bank of Zambia ZIPSS Operating Rules Revision Circular 2025
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ circular PDF discovered through the BoZ regulatory documents JSON:API. Use only for payment-rail operational context; do not infer institution-specific compliance conclusions.

name: Bank of Zambia Montran Gateway Mandatory Use Circular 2025
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ circular PDF. Use as payment-rail change context for disbursement/repayment operations.

name: Bank of Zambia Customer Complaints Handling and Resolution Directives
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ directive PDF discovered through the regulatory documents JSON:API. Use to map public complaints-handling expectations.

name: Bank of Zambia ATM POS Internet Transactions and Mobile Payments Directive 2020
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ directive PDF. Use for payment-channel operating context relevant to lending disbursement, repayment, and failed transactions.

name: Bank of Zambia Money Transfer Services Directives 2021
compliance_notes: Official public BoZ directive PDF. Use for public money-transfer/payment rail context, not institution-specific compliance conclusions.

name: ZICTA DFS Incident Reporting System
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
compliance_notes: Public incident reporting information only; never submit reports or collect personal details.

name: ZICTA DFS Report Incident Categories
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li, option
compliance_notes: Public category page only; no form submission and no personal data collection.

name: Competition and Consumer Protection Commission Notices
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
exclude_exact_titles: Competition and Consumer Protection Commission- Zambia Competition and Consumer Protection Commission- Zambia
compliance_notes: Public notices only; use as consumer-protection signal source, not as legal conclusion.

name: Data Protection Commission Zambia
list_selector: a, h1, h2, h3, p, li
exclude_keywords: legal framework act regulations quick guide guidelines registration other audit
exclude_exact_titles: Welcome to the Data Protection Commission (DPC)
compliance_notes: Public data-protection information only; summarize obligations conservatively and link the source. SSL fallback is enabled because this public site may fail local issuer-chain validation in the research environment.
